releaseNotes: Added a dedicated file-only updater with graceful OBS shutdown, backup, SHA256 verification, rollback, cleanup, and automatic relaunch.
Streaming, recording, replay buffer, and virtual camera stop normally after the user confirms an update.
YouTube URL starts empty in a new OBS session while Horizontal, Vertical, and Scale settings remain saved.
Position and overlay settings persist after OBS is closed and reopened.
Added a visible plugin version label and limited Maks chat to 6.
Preserves the approved chat animation, queue, emoji, membership badge, and polling-filter behavior.
